content:
From 00000e6a41e8d9ed6d4152547ade2c4a6f993563 Mon Sep 17 00:00:00 2001
From: randymcmillan <randy.lee.mcmillan@gmail.com>
Date: Fri, 15 Sep 2023 16:56:52 -0400
Subject: [PATCH] 2097/710116/807869/02/0005110c/1694811407/gnostr.org

---
 patch.demo.sh | 2 +-
 1 file changed, 1 insertion(+), 1 deletion(-)

diff --git a/patch.demo.sh b/patch.demo.sh
index 922fc7d..87c5310 100755
--- a/patch.demo.sh
+++ b/patch.demo.sh
@@ -38,7 +38,7 @@ for td in .gnostr/ ; do
         for f in $PATCHES; do
 
             git apply --allow-empty  <(cat $f)
-            gnostr-legit . -p 00000 -m "$(date +%s)/$(pwd | grep -o "[^/]*$")" | gnostr-cat -u wss://relay.damus.io | $(grep "OK" || echo 'working...')
+            gnostr-legit . -p 00000 -m "$(date +%s)/$(pwd | grep -o '[^/]*$')" | gnostr-cat -u wss://relay.damus.io | $(grep 'OK' || echo 'working...')
 
         done
     done
--
libgit2 1.6.4
